mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_classroom_portrait_unit (unit_name, datavalue, stu_datavalue, unit_id, classroom_id, course_id, num, `type`, order_num, pid) VALUES
(#{item.unitName}, #{item.dataValue}, #{item.stuDataValue}, #{item.id}, #{classroomId}, #{courseId}, #{num}, #{item.type}, #{item.orderNum}, #{item.pid})
mapper.select: SELECT unit_id as id, unit_name as unitName, datavalue as dataValue, stu_datavalue as stuDataValue, `type`, order_num as orderNum, pid FROM ai_classroom_portrait_unit WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND num = #{num}
